film.title: Broadway Idiot
film.overview: Broadway Idiot follows Green Day's Billie Joe Armstrong from a punk rock concert at Madison Square Garden to the opening of his musical American Idiot on Broadway - only ten blocks away, but worlds apart. From behind the curtain share in the crazy journey of turning the mega-hit album into a punk rock musical - and ultimately see how the world of theater transformed Billie Joe.

dialogues.dialogue: ♪ Hear the sound of the falling rain ♪  ♪ Coming down like an armageddon flame ♪  ♪ The shame, the ones who died without a name ♪  ♪ Here the dogs howling out of key ♪  ♪ To a hymn called Faith and Misery ♪
I'm like "f**k".  She's like "oops, we have this problem".  ♪ I don't feel any shame, I won't apologize ♪  ♪ When there ain't nowhere you can go ♪  So I end up having to stay at home.
dialogues.cause_raw: not taking responsibility for a problem

dialogues.dialogue: ♪ Does it take your breath away ♪  ♪ And you feel yourself suffocating ♪  ♪ Does the pain weigh out the pride ♪  ♪ And you look for a place to hide ♪  For me recording and producing is... it's psychological.
♪ Does it take your breath away ♪  ♪ And you feel yourself suffocating ♪  ♪ Does the pain weigh out the pride ♪  ♪ And you look for a place to hide ♪  ♪ Did someone break your heart inside ♪
so fly with it.  It's in-we're in spectacular shape.  I couldn't be prouder of it.  It's such a weird feeling because since, you know,  since the beginning we've been working and working
